Commercial

Office & retail space in West Columbia.

Prime second-floor space in one of West Columbia's most active corridors.

A flexible second-floor space in the flourishing State Street corridor, steps from dining, shopping, and the riverfront, just across the Gervais Street Bridge from downtown Columbia.

Commercial · For Rent

134½ State Street

West Columbia, SC · State Street corridor
For Rent

This second-floor commercial space sits in the flourishing West Columbia area, just a few steps from the corner of Meeting Street and State Street. The property is conveniently located within a block of the best dining, shopping, and riverfront residential area.

Downtown Columbia, the Vista, and USC are all in close proximity, just across the Gervais Street Bridge. The space offers an open, flexible layout suited to a range of office or professional uses.

  • ±2,875 SF second floor
  • Open, flexible layout
  • Two private offices
  • Conference room
  • Coffee / break area
  • Storage / utility area
  • Restrooms
  • Exclusive back-entrance deck
  • 10 reserved daytime parking spaces
$2,500 /mo · modified gross
Square Feet±2,875
FloorSecond
Offices2 + conf.
Parking10 reserved
